title:
🍰🇯🇲 Made to order, packed with flavour, and baked with love.

Our Caribbean Wray & Nephew Rum Cake comes with a pot of homemade rum icing for just £4, or treat yourself to our Honey Jerk Chicken Salad + Rum Cake combo for only £10! 🤩

Everything is made fresh to order, using authentic Caribbean ingredients for unbeatable flavour in every bite.

⚠️ Limited availability – once they’re gone, they’re gone! Pre-order now to avoid missing out. 🇯🇲❤️
